mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum (userId, forumTitle, forumText, forumFeature, forumContentUrl, createdTime) VALUES (#{userId}, #{forumTitle}, #{forumText}, #{forumFeature}, #{forumContentUrl}, #{createdTime})
mapper.select: SELECT userId, forumId, forumTitle, forumText, forumFeature, forumContentUrl, createdTime FROM forum ORDER BY createdTime DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{size}

SELECT userId, forumId, forumTitle, forumText, forumFeature, forumContentUrl, createdTime FROM forum WHERE forumFeature LIKE CONCAT('%', #{feature}, '%') OR forumTitle LIKE CONCAT('%', #{feature}, '%') OR forumText LIKE CONCAT('%', #{feature}, '%') ORDER BY createdTime DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{size}
